segments: حَدَّثَنَا سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَنِ اَلْحَارِثِيِّ عَنْ زِيَادٍ اَلْقَنْدِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ ع قَالَ : كَفَى اَلْمُؤْمِنَ مِنَ اَللَّهِ نُصْرَةً أَنْ يَرَى عَدُوَّهُ يَعْمَلُ بِمَعَاصِي اَللَّهِ.
arabic.text: حَدَّثَنَا سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَنِ اَلْحَارِثِيِّ عَنْ زِيَادٍ اَلْقَنْدِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ ع قَالَ : كَفَى اَلْمُؤْمِنَ مِنَ اَللَّهِ نُصْرَةً أَنْ يَرَى عَدُوَّهُ يَعْمَلُ بِمَعَاصِي اَللَّهِ.

segments: My father, Allah may have mercy upon him, narrated to us from Sa’d bin Abdullah from … al-Harithi from Ziyad al-Qandi that Abu Abdullah (a) said: To see the enemy plunge in the acts of disobedience to Allah is a sufficient victory that Allah bestows upon the servant.
en.badr-shahin.text: My father, Allah may have mercy upon him, narrated to us from Sa’d bin Abdullah from … al-Harithi from Ziyad al-Qandi that Abu Abdullah (a) said: To see the enemy plunge in the acts of disobedience to Allah is a sufficient victory that Allah bestows upon the servant.
